positive: A minimalist, symmetrical composition featuring a detailed silhouette of a roaring lion and a celestial crescent moon overlaid on a stylized jungle foliage pattern. The lion should have strong, dramatic lines and a regal posture, while the moon features subtle glowing details. Use a limited color palette of deep emerald green, sapphire blue, and metallic gold accents. The overall style should be highly detailed negative space art, resembling sophisticated tattoo flash or vintage botanical illustration, ensuring clean lines and strong contrast suitable for screen printing. Central focus, symmetrical design, isolated on a clean white background.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noisy, lowres, amateur, messy, illegible, cropped
